title: Atlas Expansion XIV: Domains 806-835 (Representation Theory & K-Theory)

k_theory.object: EML classification: K-theory and motivic cohomology domains 821-835

D821.name: Algebraic K-theory K_n(R)
D821.reason: Higher K-groups via BGL⁺; complex homotopy = EML-3

D822.name: Milnor K-theory K^M_n(F)
D822.reason: Tensor product of F×/(2): algebraic = EML-0

D823.name: Motivic cohomology H^{p,q}(X,Z)
D823.reason: Algebraic cycles modulo equivalence; complex = EML-3

D824.name: Bloch-Kato conjecture (Voevodsky)
D824.reason: Norm residue map K^M → H^n_et: complex = EML-3

summary.new_theorem: T153: Atlas Batch 14 (S433): 30 representation theory/K-theory; total 835

verdicts.k_theory: K-theory/motivic/THH/TC: all EML-3; Milnor K-theory: EML-0

key_theorem: Atlas Batch 14 (T153, S433): 30 representation theory/K-theory domains. Nearly all EML-3: Lie reps, Geometric Langlands, perverse sheaves, KLR categorification, algebraic K-theory, motivic cohomology, THH, TC, Connes NCG. Only EML-0: finite group reps (character tables) and Milnor K-theory (purely algebraic). EML-∞: modular rep theory (decomposition numbers non-constructive) and algebraic cycles. 0 violations. Total domains: 835.
rabbit_hole_log: Geometric Langlands: EML-3 (D-modules on Bun_G = complex analytic)
THH/TC: EML-3 (cyclotomic structure via Nikolaus-Scholze = complex)
Modular representation theory: EML-∞ (Lusztig conjectures still open in small char)
Connes NCG: EML-3 (spectral triple — complex Dirac operator)
NEW: T153 Atlas Batch 14 — 30 domains, 0 violations, total 835
